steps.title: Identify the challenge described in the explanation
steps.content: The colon reveals why researchers need large samples: “a substantial number of participants will withdraw or fall out of contact” over time. This describes the gradual loss of the study population.

steps.title: Find the term that names this loss
steps.content:
The blank needs to name the phenomenon of participants withdrawing or falling out of contact over time. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘attrition’: means the gradual reduction of a group through loss — exactly what happens when participants withdraw or drop out of a long study. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘circumspection’: means caution or careful consideration — describes a mental attitude, not the loss of participants from a study. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘impartiality’: means fairness or lack of bias — a quality of researchers, not a phenomenon explaining why large samples are needed. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘replicability’: means the ability to repeat an experiment with the same results — a separate methodological concern, unrelated to participants dropping out. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
